About: Transitioning from a robust background in Systems Engineering and Infrastructure to dedicated Software Development. I leverage my deep IT experience to build efficient, automated, and scalable software solutions. Passionate about coding, I specialize in creating tools that optimize workflows, utilizing platforms like PowerApps, Go, and scripting languages to solve complex business problems.

Projects.Name: Terminal Portfolio Showcase
Projects.Description: A beautiful, interactive terminal-based portfolio built using the Model-View-Update (MVU) pattern to showcase software development and engineering skills natively in the command line.

Projects.Name: Flash Alert Tool
Projects.Description: Researched and developed a PowerApps solution for the Gulf Coast Division, providing an intuitive, fast application to send scheduled and unscheduled downtime alerts, allowing engineering teams to focus on critical issues.

Projects.Name: PAR Tracking Application
Projects.Description: Architected and created a PAR tracking application for the West Houston team to provide precise tracking of stock levels and generate streamlined presentations for executive CFO approvals.

Supported executive and administrative personnel with accuracy and efficiency.
